title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at RITES - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at RITES - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the RITES family as a Distribution Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!
